title: Alolan Raichu Battle Guide
summary: An [Electric]/[Psychic] special sweeper whose [surge-surfer] doubles Speed in electric terrain — effective Speed 220.
strengths: [nasty-plot] setup leads to explosive special damage
weaknesses: Loses Speed advantage outside electric terrain

recommendedItems.reason: Setup insurance for the first turn

bodyMarkdown:
## Overview
Alolan Raichu is an [Electric]/[Psychic] special sweeper whose identity comes from [surge-surfer] — a signature ability that doubles its Speed in electric terrain. Combined with base 110 Speed, this turns Alolan Raichu into a functional Speed 220 threat that outruns scarfed top-tier Pokemon.

## Strengths
[surge-surfer] under electric terrain is the whole game plan — at effective 220 Speed, Alolan Raichu outpaces almost everything. [Psychic] secondary typing adds a [Fighting] immunity and gives [psyshock] a secondary STAB. After [nasty-plot], [thunderbolt] and [psyshock] hit hard enough to threaten most neutral targets.

## Weaknesses & Answers
[Dark], [Ghost], [Bug], and [Ground] all threaten KOs. 60/50/85 bulk folds to any priority move. Most critically, without electric terrain the entire strategy falls apart — Speed 110 is merely average in the current meta.

## Recommended Moveset
[thunderbolt] is the locked STAB. [psyshock] is the secondary STAB that targets Defense for punishing special walls. [nasty-plot] is the setup move. [focus-blast] covers [Dark] and [Steel] walls like [tyranitar] and [heatran].

## Item · Ability · Tera
[focus-sash] provides setup insurance. [choice-specs] is an alternative for immediate damage without setup. [surge-surfer] is mandatory. Tera [Electric] stacks STAB on [thunderbolt] or Tera [Psychic] on [psyshock] — pick based on coverage needs.

## Teammates & Synergy
Pair with an electric terrain setter — [tapu-koko] or [pincurchin] — this is non-negotiable. Cover [Ground] with [Grass] or [Flying], and [Dark]/[Bug] with [Fairy] or [Fire]. [fake-out] support protects the setup window.

## Play Patterns
Switch in after electric terrain is up, [nasty-plot] on a predicted switch, then spam [thunderbolt] and [psyshock]. Race against the terrain timer and finish before the boost wears off. Switch out against [Dark] or [Ghost] types immediately.
